query: Phase II trial pembrolizumab brachytherapy recurrent cervical cancer

results.title: Phase I, II and III Trials in Inflammatory Bowel Diseases: A Practical Guide for the Non-specialist.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 31901097. 2020/06/19 00:00. METHODS: All oncology drugs approved by the European Medicines Agency 
() were included. Phase II and phase III trials were matched based on 
indication and treatment and patient characteristics. Reported objective 
response rates (ORR), median progression-free survival (PFS) and median overall 
survival (OS) were analysed through weighted mixed-effects regression with 
previous treatment, treatment regimen, blinding, randomization, marketing 
authorization
